_comment: 21 hooks for clip_002 — round-robin slice of the 144-hook library from clip_001.
hooks:
The solutions to my problem isn't
dating an older guy.. but let me check

Most guys talk big until it gets real.
think you'd actually be able to handle me?

Any electricians out there
that can answer a quick question for me?

When we've been arguing
and he's asking wth I even want..

giving you yet another reason
to stop and stare

if you f my p i will s your D till you C
if you understand say hi
so i know you're my type 😈

would your gf let you
be friends with me?
